resources.string: Build convoy routes across island harbors and defeat the enemy by winning the supply war.
Tap an owned harbor, then tap a linked harbor to open a route. Use Surge to refill stock and Upgrade to strengthen critical ports.
Review your route web, then resume the convoy push when ready.
Route status and flagship condition will appear here.
Route mode. Tap one owned harbor, then a linked harbor to toggle a convoy line.
Surge mode. Tap an owned harbor to inject stock and energize its guns.
Upgrade mode. Tap an owned harbor to improve dock speed, hull strength, or cannon range.
